message:
perf(stream): #[inline] remaining stream futures (next, collect, fold, for_each, count, peekable)

Complete the stream module inline coverage: Next::poll, Collect::poll,
Fold::poll, ForEach::poll, Count::poll, and Peekable::poll_next. These
are the terminal operations and most-used entry point (next) for every
stream pipeline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
